mapper.select: SELECT NAME, EMAIL FROM USERS WHERE USER_ID = #{userID} AND PASSWORD = #{password}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO USERS (USER_ID, EMAIL, NAME, PASSWORD) VALUES (#{userID}, #{email}, #{name}, #{password})
mapper.select: SELECT USER_ID FROM USERS WHERE USER_ID = #{userID}
mapper.update: UPDATE USERS SET PASSWORD = #{password} WHERE USER_ID = #{userID} AND EMAIL = #{email}
mapper.select: SELECT USER_ID FROM USERS WHERE NAME = #{name} AND EMAIL = #{email}
